profile.markdown:
**Full Name:** SMART-01

**Alias:**
- Steel Sweetheart
- Prototype One
- Jawhead (by Ailee)

**Chinese Name:** 大铁罐 (dàtiěguàn, "Great Metal Pot" )

**Origin:** Laboratory 1718

**Species:** Robot

**Gender:** Ungendered

**Occupation:** Guardian of Henry family

**Weapons:** Smart missiles

**Relationships:** Prof. and Mrs. Henry (creator)

**Related Character:**

- **Name:** Ailee
  - Full Name: Ailee Henry
  - Alias: Honey/Honeybear (by Jawhead)
  - Species: Human
  - Relationships: Prof. and Mrs. Henry (parents)

story.markdown:
> "Intelligent robot used to protect little Ailee"

This intelligent robot developed by Henry and his wife is armed with weapons and strong defensive capabilities, and can also act as a housekeeper. It is responsible for protecting the couple's daughter little Ailee after their disappearance.

details.markdown:
Jawhead's attacks apply a stack of Mecha Suppression on hit (up to 10 stacks). Each stack lasts 3 seconds and increases the damage of Jawhead's Physical Basic Attacks to the enemy by 8%.

Basic Attack Damage Increase Per Stack: 8% / 16% / 24% / 32% / 40% / 48% / 56% / 64% / 72% / 80%

Notes:
- Only applies to non-minion enemies.
- Jawhead's attacks also refresh the duration of the stacks.
- Attacks that apply Mecha Suppression stacks only refer to Jawhead's basic attack and skill damage dealt.

Jawhead launches up to 12 missiles at random nearby enemies over 5 seconds, each missile dealing physical damage to the enemy hit.

Base Damage per missile: 135 / 160 / 185 / 210 / 235 / 260

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Mana Cost: 60 / 65 / 70 / 75 / 80 / 85

Jawhead gains 30% Movement Speed and a shield for several seconds. Jawhead then flings the nearest unit (prioritizes heroes) to the target location, dealing physical damage to enemies in the area and stunning them for 0.5 seconds. This skill can be used on allied heroes and they will not take damage.

Base Shield: 250 / 320 / 390 / 460 / 530 / 600
Base Damage: 300 / 340 / 380 / 420 / 460 / 500

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Control Effects:
- Stun (0.5 seconds)
- Displacement via fling

Movement Effect:
- 30% Movement Speed bonus for Jawhead

Mana Cost: 80 / 90 / 100 / 110 / 120 / 130

Jawhead charges into the target enemy hero, dealing physical damage and briefly stunning them. Enemies around the target are knocked back and dealt the same amount of damage. Jawhead is immune to control effects during the charge.

Base Damage: 350 / 475 / 600

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Control Effects:
- Stun on the primary target
- Knockback to nearby enemies

Mobility Effect:
- Blink-style charge to the target enemy hero

Mana Cost: 120 / 150 / 180

Notes:
- This ability has three phases:
  - Jawhead begins to channel the charge. If interrupted at this step, the ability does not go on cooldown.
  - Jawhead travels to the target.
  - Upon hitting the target, Jawhead loses crowd control immunity and nearby enemies are knocked back.

trivia.markdown: Jawhead is the only hero who carries a companion (Ailee) that does not help or assist in fight.
Revisions of the name of Ailee was made from Alice and Ellie.
Almost all of Jawhead's skins has two eyes or lens which is different from default's one.
"Victory Loader" is the first skin that use Ailee's face in the avatar icon instead of using Jawhead's face.

markdown:
# Profile

**Full Name:** SMART-01

**Alias:**
- Steel Sweetheart
- Prototype One
- Jawhead (by Ailee)

**Chinese Name:** 大铁罐 (dàtiěguàn, "Great Metal Pot" )

**Origin:** Laboratory 1718

**Species:** Robot

**Gender:** Ungendered

**Occupation:** Guardian of Henry family

**Weapons:** Smart missiles

**Relationships:** Prof. and Mrs. Henry (creator)

**Related Character:**

- **Name:** Ailee
  - Full Name: Ailee Henry
  - Alias: Honey/Honeybear (by Jawhead)
  - Species: Human
  - Relationships: Prof. and Mrs. Henry (parents)

# Story

> "Intelligent robot used to protect little Ailee"

This intelligent robot developed by Henry and his wife is armed with weapons and strong defensive capabilities, and can also act as a housekeeper. It is responsible for protecting the couple's daughter little Ailee after their disappearance.

# Abilities

## Mecha Suppression

Jawhead's attacks apply a stack of Mecha Suppression on hit (up to 10 stacks). Each stack lasts 3 seconds and increases the damage of Jawhead's Physical Basic Attacks to the enemy by 8%.

Basic Attack Damage Increase Per Stack: 8% / 16% / 24% / 32% / 40% / 48% / 56% / 64% / 72% / 80%

Notes:
- Only applies to non-minion enemies.
- Jawhead's attacks also refresh the duration of the stacks.
- Attacks that apply Mecha Suppression stacks only refer to Jawhead's basic attack and skill damage dealt.

## Smart Missiles

Jawhead launches up to 12 missiles at random nearby enemies over 5 seconds, each missile dealing physical damage to the enemy hit.

Base Damage per missile: 135 / 160 / 185 / 210 / 235 / 260

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Mana Cost: 60 / 65 / 70 / 75 / 80 / 85

## Ejector

Jawhead gains 30% Movement Speed and a shield for several seconds. Jawhead then flings the nearest unit (prioritizes heroes) to the target location, dealing physical damage to enemies in the area and stunning them for 0.5 seconds. This skill can be used on allied heroes and they will not take damage.

Base Shield: 250 / 320 / 390 / 460 / 530 / 600
Base Damage: 300 / 340 / 380 / 420 / 460 / 500

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Control Effects:
- Stun (0.5 seconds)
- Displacement via fling

Movement Effect:
- 30% Movement Speed bonus for Jawhead

Mana Cost: 80 / 90 / 100 / 110 / 120 / 130

## Unstoppable Force

Jawhead charges into the target enemy hero, dealing physical damage and briefly stunning them. Enemies around the target are knocked back and dealt the same amount of damage. Jawhead is immune to control effects during the charge.

Base Damage: 350 / 475 / 600

Damage Type: Physical damage skill

Control Effects:
- Stun on the primary target
- Knockback to nearby enemies

Mobility Effect:
- Blink-style charge to the target enemy hero

Mana Cost: 120 / 150 / 180

Notes:
- This ability has three phases:
  - Jawhead begins to channel the charge. If interrupted at this step, the ability does not go on cooldown.
  - Jawhead travels to the target.
  - Upon hitting the target, Jawhead loses crowd control immunity and nearby enemies are knocked back.

# Trivia

- Jawhead is the only hero who carries a companion (Ailee) that does not help or assist in fight.
- Revisions of the name of Ailee was made from Alice and Ellie.
- Almost all of Jawhead's skins has two eyes or lens which is different from default's one.
- "Victory Loader" is the first skin that use Ailee's face in the avatar icon instead of using Jawhead's face.

metadata.hook: All Ailee knows is that the special robot calling her “Honey” has always been by her side, guarding her in place of the parents who vanished without a trace.
metadata.teaser: Built as the ultimate prototype weapon, SMART-01 defied its makers’ fate to become Jawhead, the steadfast steel guardian of a little girl named Ailee.
metadata.openingLine: Clandestine organizations have existed throughout the many ages of the Land of Dawn's history.
